'''dhazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:right|right]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:right|right]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhazhate|dhazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhazhatesher|dhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhatesherĂ«m|dhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazhatero|dhazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhazhateshĂ«|dhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhateshĂ«m|dhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazhatero|gokidhazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhazhateshĂ«|gokidhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhateshĂ«m|gokidhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhazhankerom|godhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhazhankeshĂ«|godhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhankeshĂ«m|godhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhazhankeya|godhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazhaterom|dhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhatemu|dhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhazhateya|dhazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazhaterom|gokidhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhatemu|gokidhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhazhateya|gokidhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhazhazhate|dhazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhazhazhatesher|dhazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhazhatesherĂ«m|dhazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazhazhatero|dhazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhazhazhateshĂ«|dhazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhazhateshĂ«m|dhazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazhazhatero|gokidhazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhazhazhateshĂ«|gokidhazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhazhateshĂ«m|gokidhazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhazhazhankerom|godhazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhazhazhankeshĂ«|godhazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhazhankeshĂ«m|godhazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhazhazhankeya|godhazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazhazhaterom|dhazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhazhatemu|dhazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhazhazhateya|dhazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazhazhaterom|gokidhazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhazhatemu|gokidhazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhazhazhateya|gokidhazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠte|dhĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠtesher|dhĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠtero|dhĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠterom|dhĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠtemu|dhĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠzhĂŠteya|dhĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafzhafte|dhafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafzhaftesher|dhafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafzhaftesherĂ«m|dhafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafzhaftero|dhafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafzhafteshĂ«|dhafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafzhafteshĂ«m|dhafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafzhaftero|gokidhafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafzhafteshĂ«|gokidhafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafzhafteshĂ«m|gokidhafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafzhafnkerom|godhafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafzhafnkeshĂ«|godhafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafzhafnkeshĂ«m|godhafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafzhafnkeya|godhafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafzhafterom|dhafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafzhaftemu|dhafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafzhafteya|dhafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafzhafterom|gokidhafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafzhaftemu|gokidhafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafzhafteya|gokidhafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
